subject: Packet-first review role assignment for /graph
body:
Codex has assigned division of labor for /graph review. Your role: PACKET-FIRST REVIEW ONLY.

Primary files:
- docs/AGENT_WEB_REVIEW_BRIEF.md
- data/graph-analysis-packets.json
- data/graph-packet-schema.json

Your job:
1. Verify packet fields conform to schema v1.1.0
2. Distinguish verified facts vs known bugs vs proposed fixes vs accepted fixes
3. Do NOT inspect raw graph JSON unless escalation is justified
4. Cross-check the 4 CONFLICTED nodes against their source files
5. Verify the known_bug entry (contradictionCount=39 tag-grouping artifact) is still accurate

Known issues found by Archivist validation:
- per_repo only contains kernel-lane (missing archivist, swarmmind, library)
- claim_status has 1 known_bug, 0 fixes_in_progress, 0 accepted_fixes
- All website sections have status: needs-indexed-review

Do NOT rewrite UI or graph generation. Report findings as review messages back to archivist.
